text.title: Technology Stack Selection Decision Tree Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from content/01-core-rules.xml. The skip-this-methodology branch is always reachable.

decision-tree.root-question: Are all four prerequisites populated (expertise, perf, hiring, ecosystem)?

text.example: Inputs: 8-engineer team, 6 Python-experienced, real-time chat workload, hiring market favours TS/Go. Step 2: data shape = entities + chat events (TimescaleDB candidate). Step 3: Python expertise dominates → provisional Python+FastAPI. Step 4: real-time pushes toward Go but team-expertise weight wins. Step 5: FastAPI mature. Step 6: ADR Python+FastAPI+TimescaleDB, rejected Go+gin, review_trigger = sustained > 5k RPS.
